description_long: This is a compact, light wood desk with a minimalist, mid-century modern design. It features a rectangular tabletop with a raised back panel, likely serving as a privacy screen or a hinged lid for a storage compartment. The desk stands on four tapered legs, with the right side incorporating a boxy extension that may house a drawer or additional storage. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a smooth finish. This desk is suitable for small spaces and urban environments where both function and style are important.
description: A compact, light wood desk with a raised back panel, tapered legs, and a boxy side extension for storage. Its minimalist design and visible wood grain give it a modern, natural look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main tabletop, raised back panel, and the right-side boxy extension.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the depth of the raised back panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back of the raised panel and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the boxy extension and the hinges of the raised back panel.
attribute_orientation: The side with the boxy extension and the main tabletop is intended to face the user, with the raised back panel at the rear serving as a privacy screen or lid.
attribute_usage_context: writing desk or vanity with storage
